label: Strategy Live Status
description: Inspect one live round for child process state, live-loop activity, post-live tasks, preflight, and stop criteria.

outputs.name: live_status
outputs.description: Live round state, child process state, post-live work, freshness, and blockers.

failureModes.description: The round directory does not exist or is not readable.
The supervisor or child loop exited unexpectedly.
Live has finished but post-live backtests or compares have not completed.

evidencePolicy: Live status is operational evidence, not strategy promotion evidence by itself.
A quiet round with post-live work pending is not a fresh live sample.
Use this before reading high-volume logs.
notes: This explicit descriptor maps the adapter acceptance item named live status.
